description_long: This sculpture depicts the bust of a gorilla, rendered with detailed fur texture and a lifelike facial expression. The gorilla's head and upper torso are positioned on a rectangular base, with the arms resting forward and the face slightly angled downward, giving it a contemplative look. The fur is intricately sculpted, with varying shades of brown and black to enhance realism. The face is expressive, with pronounced brow ridges, deep-set eyes, and a broad, flat nose. The back of the sculpture is rounded and textured to mimic the gorilla's natural fur, while the base is flat and sturdy, suitable for display on a pedestal or plinth. A small plaque or inscription appears to be present on the front of the base, though the text is not legible.
description: A detailed gorilla bust sculpture with textured fur and a lifelike, expressive face, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gorilla's profile, with detailed fur texture and the arm resting along the base.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the gorilla's expressive face, chest, and the plaque on the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the gorilla's head and arm.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded, textured back and the top of the head, with the base visible below.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
